subcodes.first_line: O my God! Illumine the eyes of hearts with the light of Thy countenance, O Beloved, then make them steadfast in Thy Cause. Verily Thou art [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی انر ابصار القلوب بنور وجهک یا محبوب ثم اجعلهم ثابتا علی امرک انک انت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for spiritual recognition, @rejection, opposition and persecution
